response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title 'Confessions of a Rotten Girl' and artist 'SAWTOWNE' from the screen text at the start of the performance. Performed a search for 'Confessions of a Rotten Girl SAWTOWNE lyrics' and found the English lyrics. The video is a performance by Takanashi Kiara. The lyrics are in English, so they are used for both original and translated fields.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue segment between virtual YouTubers followed by a performance of the song 'Confessions of a Rotten Girl' by Takanashi Kiara.

scenes.description: Dialogue between Takanashi Kiara, Mori Calliope, and Ninomae Ina'nis.
Performance of 'Confessions of a Rotten Girl' by Takanashi Kiara.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Dear God
I've come to repent my sins
Let your blood wash me clean, for I'm
I'm, I'm
I'm a rotten girl
I swore I'd never sin again (Amen)
But my patience's running thin
The temptation's flowing through my veins
I'm bound and tied by the shackles of shame
I promise I'd indulge no more
But my heart, I can't ignore
In my dreams they're turning off the beam
I'm a dirty, rotten girl

I'm locked
Underneath the bleachers, just watch
Look beyond the smoke and mirrors
Hide-struck, shunned, the nunbeliever
Our reparation would never be complete
Red hot tension leaves me with whispers
Snapshot, quiet moans and muffled whimpers
Come on, can't you feel the fever
Rising up, rising up to the sky
And stay they're doing the fear, crushing in my skin
The Lord's saying hope my child, don't give in to sin
It's driving me crazy
The urge to forsake the ends of
Some things that are shifting
We're thin and we're dancing bliss
I swore I'd never sin again
But my patience's running thin
Still them, calls are breathing down my neck
I wonder if they're hiding from me
Or they're the fruits before my eyes
And the taste that's all divine
My regrets, regretting history
I'm a staff of a bad girl

Someone, please tell me what to do
Because, honestly, I just can't stop
I've been trying so hard and I can't stop
What was God thinking?
And I, I know I'm supposed to be a good girl, but
Some hearts just can't control myself
Every time I see them
Touching, skin to skin
My mind goes, my mind goes

Could it be the light?
I'm pushing you lead us for the light
With all the broken cycles of our love,
And I'm driven by
Because somebody saved me
The urge to forsake the steel, something
Some things that are shifting, within this wicked bliss
I swore I'd never sin again
But my patience's running thin
Still the calls, they're breathing down my neck
I wonder if they're hiding from me
Or they've been fruits before my eyes
And the taste that's all divine
My regrets, regretting history
I'm a staff of a bad girl

Someone, please tell me what to do
Because, honestly, I just can't stop
I've been trying so hard and I can't stop
What was God thinking?
And I, I know I'm supposed to be a good girl, but
Some hearts just can't control myself
Every time I see them
Touching, skin to skin
My mind goes, my mind goes
